steps.label: Step 1:
steps.body:
Adults \_\_\_\_\_\_\_ 13 and older

Children \_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_ 2-12 years

Infants \_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_ under 2 years

validation.message: Please enter number of adults
Please enter number of children
Please enter number of infants

steps.label: Step 2:
steps.body: Date of Tour (Add calendar up to 6 months in advance since we can only accept 6 months in advance reservation of the date of booking)

validation.message: Please select a date within the next 6 months

steps.label: Step 3:
steps.body:
Passenger 1 

First Name \_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_

Last Name \_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_

Gender \_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_

Body Weight \_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_

Date of Birth \_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_

Passport ID \_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_

Passport Expiry Date \_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_

Passport Issued by \_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_ add Country listing

Nationally \_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_

Email \_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_

Telephone number: \_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_

Hotel Name: \_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_

Meal Preference \_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_ Add Drop Down List: 1\. BBQ Chicken Lunch (Included

							       2\. Lobster Lunch (add $15)

							     3\. Fish (add $10)

						   	     4\. Conch (add $10)

							    5\. Shrimp (add $10)

							   6\. Vegetarian Meal (add $5)

Comments \_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_

Step 4: Review Page and request Booking

Step 5: Tour and Cancellation Policy

Step 6: 

**Thank you for your booking request.**  
A member of our customer service team will review your booking request, and if availability is confirmed, you will receive an email **momentarily** containing your **invoice** and a **secure payment link powered by Fygaro**, our trusted payment platform.

We appreciate your interest in Barbuda Leisure and look forward to hosting you soon.

*This message could be sent to the customer email as well*
